title: Mistress Mouse and the Pink Tow Truck Rescue
summary: Mistress Mouse and her trusty pink tow truck are the ultimate heroes on wheels. When a family of pigs gets their car stuck in a muddy mixture of leaves and acorns, Mistress Mouse arrives to pull them out. To celebrate, the pig family hosts a grand dinner where Mistress Mouse is honored with a massive Lego tower built by Penny and Pickles—a tower so tall it eventually goes 'kaboom!' Later, the adventure continues as Mistress Mouse helps Mischief Mouse, whose own tow truck has broken down. Their shared journey leads to a celebratory spaghetti feast and a heartwarming surprise: a coloring book featuring a very sleepy sloth. From muddy fields to cozy homes, Mistress Mouse proves that a helping hand can lead to new friends and great memories.

highlightQuote.text: Remember, when you have to cry, you have energy but when... when you don't cry, you will have to take your energy out from crying. Just like I'm crying, so I got to take everything out of my body so I can be nice and good.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A story about... Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse.

transcript.text: Mistress Mouse going to outer space and seeing the stars and planets.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, that's not a good idea. Let's... a story about Mistress Mouse in her pink tow truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well what if the pink tow truck could fly?

transcript.text: No, it doesn't fly. It drives.

transcript.text: Okay, well let's start the story about Mistress Mouse's pink tow truck driving...

transcript.text: ...and towing things.

transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The pig family's car is stuck.

transcript.text: The pig family's car is stuck? Oh no, how did it get stuck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: In some leaves and acorns and some other things.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Some leaves and acorns? How did that happen?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: In some grass and other things... mud too, and and all the other things.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, that sounds like the pig family's car is really stuck. And what's the pig family doing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're saying, 'Mistress Mouse, can you come tow it?'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mistress Mouse says, 'I'll be right over pig family, you just wait. Um, but I'm far away so it's going to take me a while to get there.' And so Mistress Mouse got in her truck and started to drive. But the pig family knew it would be a long time, so what did they do while they were waiting?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They played with their sisters and brothers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what kind of playing did they do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They did some playing with their shovels and everything.

transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: They were digging some pits.

transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So Mistress Mouse could get their car out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, they were helping to dig out the car. That's so helpful of them. And what were Penny and Pickles doing?

transcript.text: They were staying at home.

transcript.text: Oh, they were staying at home? It's just Ma and Pa Pig?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What are Penny and Pickles Pigs doing at home?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're playing Legos.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They are? What are they making out of Legos?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're making a tall, tall tower for Mistress Mouse to see.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...and that might surprise her.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, it might be very surprising. And Mistress Mouse will get here soon. Pa Pig and Ma Pig were digging in the mud and the muck, digging through all the leaves and acorns to try to get their car out. And they had to take a break because they were so tired, and they were waiting for a long time, but finally, vroom vroom vroom, they heard in the distance the sound of a loud truck. And they thought, 'Hmm, I wonder who's coming?' And they saw it coming closer and closer and they saw, 'Oh, that looks like a pink truck. I wonder whose truck that is.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Mistress Mouse's truck!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's Mistress Mouse's truck bumping along the road, and it finally pulled up into the field where the pig family car had gotten stuck in the muck and was buried in mud and leaves and acorns. But Mistress Mouse got out of her truck and she said, 'Oh, I see you've been working hard,' because she saw that Pa Pig and Ma Pig had been digging all around the car to try to get it out. And she said, 'Well, do you still need a tow?' And Ma Pig got in the car and started their little car, vroom vroom vroom, and she pressed the gas pedal to try to make it move and it just sprayed the mud all over the place and slipped around because it couldn't get out of where it was still stuck. And so Mistress Mouse said, 'That's okay, I'll give you a tow.' And so she backed her truck up, beep beep beep, and hooked it up to the pig's car, clunk. And now she got back in her truck and started it up and slowly pulled the pig's car out of the mud and the muck and it made a pop sound and it popped right out of the mud. And the pig said, 'Oh, thank you Mistress Mouse!' And she said, 'No problem!' And then Ma Pig and Pa Pig said, 'Hey Mistress Mouse, while you're here, would you like to come over to our house for dinner? I'm sure Penny and Pickles would like to meet you.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And they made a tall tower for you.

transcript.text: And they made a tall tower for you. And so everyone drove together, Ma and Pa Pig in their car and Mistress Mouse in her tow truck, back to the pig's house. And they opened the door and they said hello and what did they see?

Can I come over and eat it?' And Mischief Mouse said, 'Sure, there's plenty for everyone.' And so Mistress Mouse went over to Mischief Mouse's house, and they all had a delicious spaghetti together.

transcript.text: Nansa? Oh, that's a beautiful name. They all sat down around their big dinner table with a big steaming pot of spaghetti with tomato sauce and meatballs...

transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got to get my silly out. I got to get my tears out, and my energy out, and everything out. So I got to run, jump, got to get my silly out. I do all my things, I stay healthy. Like walk around, and drink and eat...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...and read and do everything, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. More of the story?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, everyone finished eating their delicious spaghetti, meatballs, and cheese and salad and milk. And then after dinner, Mischief Mouse said, 'Now it's time for a special surprise.' What was the surprise?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They had a present... in the back... on their stairstep... in the back of their yard, the neighbor's yard.

transcript.text: It was a medium present.

transcript.text: A medium present. And Mischief Mouse said, 'Okay, someone has to unwrap it.' Who unwrapped it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was... it was his friend Mercy Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mercy Mouse unwrapped the present and looked inside, and what was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she had crayons and and and a coloring book.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was crayons and a coloring book! And they were like, 'Yay! We love crayons and coloring books. Can we try it? Can we do it?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, you can.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so they opened up to a page of the coloring book. And what was the picture on the page?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a picture of a sloth, and so they colored it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'm just going to look for those clippers... Oh, I found them. Is it okay if I clip your nails?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Do you have so many?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There's just a couple, just two. And your braids.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I gotta keep doing my... taking my energy out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: More energy out? Okay.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, once upon a time, there was a very happy creature named...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mistress Mouse. And she was a mouse. And it was almost time for bed, but she had some energy. So what did she do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She ran and skipped. And then she was ready for bed.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then she was ready for bed. Dada, I got to get some more energy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You do? Are you almost ready for bed? Because it's almost time for bed. Here, we got to take off this dress.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dada, I got to pee!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, is the potty upstairs? Let's go use the potty.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Look, I'm still getting my energy out!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, well what we're going to do is, since you made your pee-pee, we're going to put your diaper on and then you can keep getting your energy out.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Time to poop your diaper. Ha! I did! And then ha! Two in top! Two in top!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Is that what Ma... two in top?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You're sounding like walking room? I'm gonna put a little light on, I see your stars. Okay, and now it's time to say goodnight to the stars. Goodnight stars. Do you want to do three jumps?

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Ma Pig
characters.description: The mother of the pig family whose car gets stuck in the mud.

characters.name: Pa Pig
characters.description: The father of the pig family who helps dig out their car.

characters.name: Penny Pig
characters.description: One of the pig sisters who builds a tall Lego tower for Mistress Mouse.

characters.name: Pickles Pig
characters.description: One of the pig sisters who builds a tall Lego tower and eventually knocks it down.

characters.description: A mouse from another mouse family group.

characters.description: A friend of Mischief Mouse who unwraps a special surprise present.

characters.name: Sloth
characters.description: A sleeping animal depicted in a surprise coloring book.

places.name: The Field
places.description: Behind Hattie’s house lies a sprawling, sun-drenched clearing whose pastoral beauty is now marred by a treacherous stretch of churned earth. Once a pristine open space, this grasping mire has become a heavy, rain-soaked trap, holding the pig family’s car prisoner in its deep, slick ruts.

places.name: Ma
places.description: Where the pig family hosts Mistress Mouse for a dinner of naan bread.

places.name: Pa Pig's House
places.description: Where the pig family hosts Mistress Mouse for a dinner of naan bread.

places.name: Mischief Mouse's House
places.description: Atop the weathered rafters where Mischief’s roof repairs were cut short by her sudden summoning, a festive transformation has taken hold; here, Mistress Mouse presides over a steaming spaghetti feast, her boisterous family gathered amidst the shingles and moonlight to celebrate where labor was left behind.

places.name: The Neighbor's Yard
places.description: The location where a surprise present is found on a stairstep.

places.name: Mistress Mouse's House
places.description: Mistress Mouse’s home base is a vibrant sanctuary where high-octane preparation meets playful domesticity. While it serves as the bustling staging ground for her iconic pink tow truck, it is also a private retreat where she tinkers with her toys and enjoys a quiet dinner. This pre-race haven seamlessly blends meticulous engine fine-tuning with the comforts of home, fueling her spirit long before the roar of competition begins.
